/usr/bin/ar qc libdap_json_rpc_core.a CMakeFiles/dap_json_rpc_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_notification.c.o CMakeFiles/dap_json_rpc_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_params.c.o CMakeFiles/dap_json_rpc_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_request.c.o CMakeFiles/dap_json_rpc_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_request_handler.c.o CMakeFiles/dap_json_rpc_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_response.c.o CMakeFiles/dap_json_rpc_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_response_handler.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_binary_tree.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_cbuf.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_common.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_config.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_crc64.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_file_utils.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_fnmatch.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_errors.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_list.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_math_convert.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_module.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_strfuncs.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_string.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_time.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_tsd.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_cpu_monitor.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_process_manager.c.o ../../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_process_memory.c.o ../../../client/CMakeFiles/dap_client.dir/dap_client.c.o ../../../client/CMakeFiles/dap_client.dir/dap_client_http.c.o ../../../client/CMakeFiles/dap_client.dir/dap_client_pvt.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdap_json_rpc_core.a
